title: Archdroid1188's Create Modpack
description: a fun little modpack with not to many, but not to little create addons!
body:
Hi, my name's Archdroid1188! (well not IRL but you get it)

ive made a create modpack with not to many but not to little create addons, this may have some other stuff that aint create, but if you feel somthing is missing feel free to add to it! just please dont re upload it!

Archdroid1188's create modpack consists of quite a few mods some including:
-create (... do i really need this?)
-tacz timeless and classics zero for all your american needs
-create copycats+ for decoration
and much more!

none of these mods a too hard to understand and dont need "skill" to be fun!
you can make whatever its your choice!

please make any builds you want and you can share your builds on discord here! (link coming soon)
